title: Unknown  UVM resource db internal error.
body:
Encountered this error while integrating RAL model in UVM testbench.

```
/tools/verilator/v5.019_feae9ca/bin/verilator --cc --trace --exe --main --timing -Mdir example_tb-sim \
-DUVM_NO_DPI --prefix example_tb -o example_tb +incdir+design +incdir+verif +incdir+/tools/uvm/ieee_uvm_1800.2_2017/src --timescale 1ns/1ns --error-limit 100 \
/tools/uvm/ieee_uvm_1800.2_2017/src/uvm.sv ./verif/top.sv ./design/design.sv \
-Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD -Wno-IGNOREDRETURN -Wno-CONSTRAINTIGN -Wno-ZERODLY
%Error: Internal Error: /tools/uvm/ieee_uvm_1800.2_2017/src/reg/uvm_reg_model.svh:136:9: ../V3AstNodeDType.h:1121: Typedef not linked
  136 | typedef uvm_resource_db#(uvm_reg_cvr_t) `uvm_reg_cvr_rsrc_db;`
      |         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                        /tools/uvm/ieee_uvm_1800.2_2017/src/uvm_pkg.sv:38:1: ... note: In file included from 'uvm_pkg.sv'
                        /tools/uvm/ieee_uvm_1800.2_2017/src/uvm.sv:26:1: ... note: In file included from 'uvm.sv'

```

I am using this branch for UVM related activities : https://github.com/antmicro/verilator-verification-features-tests.
Getting error from this [line ](https://github.com/antmicro/uvm-verilator/blob/2e667ac506c12e91d81bde62fe2c08d992731bd4/src/reg/uvm_reg_model.svh#L136C1-L136C61)in UVM source code.

OS used : 
```
Distributor ID: Ubuntu
Description:    Ubuntu 22.04.3 LTS
Release:        22.04
Codename:       jammy
```
This is the [Makefile](https://github.com/antmicro/verilator-verification-features-tests/blob/main/tests/uvm-testbenches/mem-tb/Makefile) I am using as a reference with no additional command arguments.
Verilator version : `Verilator 5.019 devel rev v5.018-63-gfeae9ca4a`
I am not able to use latest Verilator version as it is getting stuck in the run_test while simulation.
I am a newbie to SV & UVM, don't know much about C/C++.

It is related to #1538 
@wsnyder , @tgorochowik , @kbieganski  Is it a known issue? What could be the work around for this?
